title: Owlvex Core Security Rule Pack 2026.1
description: Expanded curated canonical issue pack covering common application security weaknesses for AI-assisted code review.

detection.llm_prompt_hint: Look for code patterns related to unsanitized sql query construction.
confidence_rules: Decrease confidence when mitigating or contradictory signals appear: prepared statement, parameter array, bound parameter.

remediation.summary: Use parameterized queries or prepared statements and validate input at trust boundaries.
cheat_sheet_refs: OWASP SQL Injection Prevention Cheat Sheet

evidence_requirements.preferred_snippet_focus: Show the line or small code region that most directly demonstrates unsanitized sql query construction.

detection.llm_prompt_hint: Look for code patterns related to unsafe shell command execution.
confidence_rules: Decrease confidence when mitigating or contradictory signals appear: execfile, shell: false, fixed arguments, validated host.

remediation.summary: Avoid shell invocation where possible; otherwise use non-shell APIs with fixed arguments and strict validation.
cheat_sheet_refs: OWASP OS Command Injection Defense Cheat Sheet

evidence_requirements.preferred_snippet_focus: Show the line or small code region that most directly demonstrates unsafe shell command execution.

issues.title: Hardcoded API key in source code
issues.summary: Hardcoded API key in source code
issues.description: Hardcoded API key in source code

detection.llm_prompt_hint: Look for code patterns related to hardcoded api key in source code.
confidence_rules: Increase confidence when one of these required signals appears: api key, apikey, api_key, client secret, secret key, access key.
Decrease confidence when mitigating or contradictory signals appear: username, user name, admin user.

remediation.summary: Move API keys to a secret manager or environment injection and fail closed if they are missing.

evidence_requirements.preferred_snippet_focus: Show the line or small code region that most directly demonstrates hardcoded api key in source code.

detection.llm_prompt_hint: Look for code patterns related to hardcoded password in source code.
confidence_rules: Increase confidence when one of these required signals appears: password, dbpassword, db password, passwd.
Decrease confidence when mitigating or contradictory signals appear: username, user name, admin user.

remediation.summary: Move passwords to a secret manager or environment injection and fail closed if they are missing.

evidence_requirements.preferred_snippet_focus: Show the line or small code region that most directly demonstrates hardcoded password in source code.

detection.llm_prompt_hint: Look for code patterns related to hardcoded token in source code.
confidence_rules: Increase confidence when one of these required signals appears: token, bearer token, auth token, jwt secret, refresh token.
Decrease confidence when mitigating or contradictory signals appear: csrf token generated per request.

remediation.summary: Move static tokens to a secret manager and rotate them out of source control immediately.

evidence_requirements.preferred_snippet_focus: Show the line or small code region that most directly demonstrates hardcoded token in source code.

detection.llm_prompt_hint: Look for code patterns related to hardcoded secret in source code.
confidence_rules: Increase confidence when one of these required signals appears: hardcoded secret, signing key, private key, embedded secret, secret.
Decrease confidence when mitigating or contradictory signals appear: username, user name, admin user, display name, ops-admin.

remediation.summary: Move secrets to a secret manager or environment injection and fail closed if they are missing.

evidence_requirements.preferred_snippet_focus: Show the line or small code region that most directly demonstrates hardcoded secret in source code.

detection.llm_prompt_hint: Look for code patterns related to untrusted filesystem path traversal.
confidence_rules: Decrease confidence when mitigating or contradictory signals appear: path.resolve(base, startswith(basedir), allow-list.

remediation.summary: Resolve paths safely, enforce a fixed base directory, and reject traversal attempts.

evidence_requirements.preferred_snippet_focus: Show the line or small code region that most directly demonstrates untrusted filesystem path traversal.

detection.llm_prompt_hint: Look for code patterns related to missing object-level authorization.
confidence_rules: Decrease confidence when mitigating or contradictory signals appear: account_id = ?, owner_id = ?, authorization check, policy.enforce.

remediation.summary: Enforce object-level authorization before read or write operations and scope queries to the authenticated actor.

evidence_requirements.preferred_snippet_focus: Show the line or small code region that most directly demonstrates missing object-level authorization.

detection.llm_prompt_hint: Look for code patterns related to sensitive data exposed in logs.
confidence_rules: Decrease confidence when mitigating or contradictory signals appear: redacted, masked, [redacted].

remediation.summary: Redact sensitive fields before logging and restrict log content to operationally necessary metadata.

evidence_requirements.preferred_snippet_focus: Show the line or small code region that most directly demonstrates sensitive data exposed in logs.

issues.title: Missing audit trail for privileged action
issues.summary: Missing audit trail for privileged action
issues.description: Missing audit trail for privileged action

detection.llm_prompt_hint: Look for code patterns related to missing audit trail for privileged action.
confidence_rules: Decrease confidence when mitigating or contradictory signals appear: audit.log, security event, immutable audit.

remediation.summary: Record immutable audit events for privileged actions with actor, action, target, and timestamp metadata.

evidence_requirements.preferred_snippet_focus: Show the line or small code region that most directly demonstrates missing audit trail for privileged action.

issues.title: Server-side request forgery through untrusted destination
issues.summary: Server-side request forgery through untrusted destination
issues.description: Server-side request forgery through untrusted destination

detection.llm_prompt_hint: Look for code patterns related to server-side request forgery through untrusted destination.
confidence_rules: Decrease confidence when mitigating or contradictory signals appear: allowed_hosts, allow-list, parsed.hostname.

remediation.summary: Restrict outbound destinations with allow-lists, block internal address ranges, and normalize parsed URLs before use.
cheat_sheet_refs: OWASP Server Side Request Forgery Prevention Cheat Sheet

evidence_requirements.preferred_snippet_focus: Show the line or small code region that most directly demonstrates server-side request forgery through untrusted destination.

detection.llm_prompt_hint: Look for code patterns related to insecure deserialization of untrusted data.
confidence_rules: Decrease confidence when mitigating or contradictory signals appear: json.parse, schema validation, signed payload.

remediation.summary: Avoid unsafe deserializers, prefer safe data-only formats, and validate or sign serialized payloads.

evidence_requirements.preferred_snippet_focus: Show the line or small code region that most directly demonstrates insecure deserialization of untrusted data.

detection.llm_prompt_hint: Look for code patterns related to weak authentication or password policy.
confidence_rules: Decrease confidence when mitigating or contradictory signals appear: argon2, rate limiter, mfa enforced, identity provider.

remediation.summary: Enforce strong password rules, add login throttling or MFA where appropriate, and rely on hardened auth providers when possible.

evidence_requirements.preferred_snippet_focus: Show the line or small code region that most directly demonstrates weak authentication or password policy.

detection.llm_prompt_hint: Look for code patterns related to reflected cross-site scripting.
confidence_rules: Decrease confidence when mitigating or contradictory signals appear: dompurify, escapehtml, sanitized, textcontent.

remediation.summary: Encode untrusted output for the target context and sanitize HTML when rich rendering is unavoidable.
cheat_sheet_refs: OWASP Cross Site Scripting Prevention Cheat Sheet

evidence_requirements.preferred_snippet_focus: Show the line or small code region that most directly demonstrates reflected cross-site scripting.

detection.llm_prompt_hint: Look for code patterns related to stored cross-site scripting.
confidence_rules: Decrease confidence when mitigating or contradictory signals appear: dompurify, escapehtml, sanitized, textcontent.

remediation.summary: Sanitize stored content before persistence or render, and apply output encoding at every display boundary.
cheat_sheet_refs: OWASP Cross Site Scripting Prevention Cheat Sheet

evidence_requirements.preferred_snippet_focus: Show the line or small code region that most directly demonstrates stored cross-site scripting.

detection.llm_prompt_hint: Look for code patterns related to open redirect through untrusted destination.
confidence_rules: Decrease confidence when mitigating or contradictory signals appear: allow-list, same-origin, validated redirect.

remediation.summary: Restrict redirects to allow-listed destinations or resolve them through server-side route names rather than raw URLs.
cheat_sheet_refs: OWASP Unvalidated Redirects and Forwards Cheat Sheet

evidence_requirements.preferred_snippet_focus: Show the line or small code region that most directly demonstrates open redirect through untrusted destination.

issues.title: Missing CSRF protection on state-changing request
issues.summary: Missing CSRF protection on state-changing request
issues.description: Missing CSRF protection on state-changing request

detection.llm_prompt_hint: Look for code patterns related to missing csrf protection on state-changing request.
confidence_rules: Decrease confidence when mitigating or contradictory signals appear: samesite=strict, csrf token, double submit cookie.

remediation.summary: Require anti-CSRF tokens or same-site protections for state-changing browser requests.
cheat_sheet_refs: OWASP Cross-Site Request Forgery Prevention Cheat Sheet

evidence_requirements.preferred_snippet_focus: Show the line or small code region that most directly demonstrates missing csrf protection on state-changing request.

detection.llm_prompt_hint: Look for code patterns related to overly permissive cors policy.
confidence_rules: Decrease confidence when mitigating or contradictory signals appear: trusted origins, specific origin allow-list.

remediation.summary: Restrict CORS origins, methods, and credential use to explicit trusted callers only.
cheat_sheet_refs: OWASP Cross Origin Resource Sharing Cheat Sheet

evidence_requirements.preferred_snippet_focus: Show the line or small code region that most directly demonstrates overly permissive cors policy.

detection.llm_prompt_hint: Look for code patterns related to weak jwt validation.
confidence_rules: Decrease confidence when mitigating or contradictory signals appear: issuer check, audience check, allowed algorithms.

remediation.summary: Verify signature, issuer, audience, expiry, and accepted algorithms explicitly for every JWT.
cheat_sheet_refs: OWASP JSON Web Token Cheat Sheet for Java

evidence_requirements.preferred_snippet_focus: Show the line or small code region that most directly demonstrates weak jwt validation.

detection.llm_prompt_hint: Look for code patterns related to unrestricted file upload.
confidence_rules: Decrease confidence when mitigating or contradictory signals appear: mime allow-list, extension allow-list, virus scan.

remediation.summary: Restrict file types and sizes, store uploads outside executable paths, and scan content before processing.

evidence_requirements.preferred_snippet_focus: Show the line or small code region that most directly demonstrates unrestricted file upload.

detection.llm_prompt_hint: Look for code patterns related to mass assignment of client-supplied fields.
confidence_rules: Decrease confidence when mitigating or contradictory signals appear: pick(, allow-list fields, dto validation.

remediation.summary: Use explicit field allow-lists or DTOs when binding client input into domain models.

evidence_requirements.preferred_snippet_focus: Show the line or small code region that most directly demonstrates mass assignment of client-supplied fields.

detection.llm_prompt_hint: Look for code patterns related to unsafe xml external entity processing.
confidence_rules: Decrease confidence when mitigating or contradictory signals appear: disallow-doctype-decl, external entities disabled.

remediation.summary: Disable external entity resolution and DTD processing in XML parsers handling untrusted input.
cheat_sheet_refs: OWASP XML External Entity Prevention Cheat Sheet

evidence_requirements.preferred_snippet_focus: Show the line or small code region that most directly demonstrates unsafe xml external entity processing.

detection.llm_prompt_hint: Look for code patterns related to weak or deprecated cryptographic primitive.
confidence_rules: Decrease confidence when mitigating or contradictory signals appear: argon2, aes-256-gcm, sha-256, bcrypt.

remediation.summary: Replace deprecated cryptographic algorithms with modern, approved primitives and secure modes.

evidence_requirements.preferred_snippet_focus: Show the line or small code region that most directly demonstrates weak or deprecated cryptographic primitive.

detection.llm_prompt_hint: Look for code patterns related to insecure randomness for security-sensitive values.
confidence_rules: Decrease confidence when mitigating or contradictory signals appear: crypto.randombytes, secrets.token, secure random.

remediation.summary: Use a cryptographically secure random source for tokens, keys, and reset links.

evidence_requirements.preferred_snippet_focus: Show the line or small code region that most directly demonstrates insecure randomness for security-sensitive values.

detection.llm_prompt_hint: Look for code patterns related to verbose error disclosure to clients.
confidence_rules: Decrease confidence when mitigating or contradictory signals appear: generic error response, safe error message.

remediation.summary: Return generic client-facing errors and log diagnostic detail only to protected internal telemetry.

evidence_requirements.preferred_snippet_focus: Show the line or small code region that most directly demonstrates verbose error disclosure to clients.

issues.title: Prototype pollution through untrusted object merge
issues.summary: Prototype pollution through untrusted object merge
issues.description: Prototype pollution through untrusted object merge

detection.llm_prompt_hint: Look for code patterns related to prototype pollution through untrusted object merge.
confidence_rules: Decrease confidence when mitigating or contradictory signals appear: hasownproperty, safe merge, schema validation.

remediation.summary: Reject dangerous object keys like __proto__ and use safe merge utilities with schema validation.
cheat_sheet_refs: OWASP Prototype Pollution Prevention Cheat Sheet

evidence_requirements.preferred_snippet_focus: Show the line or small code region that most directly demonstrates prototype pollution through untrusted object merge.

detection.llm_prompt_hint: Look for code patterns related to regular expression denial of service.
confidence_rules: Decrease confidence when mitigating or contradictory signals appear: bounded input, safe-regex, timeout.

remediation.summary: Avoid catastrophic regex patterns or enforce bounded input sizes and regex timeouts.

evidence_requirements.preferred_snippet_focus: Show the line or small code region that most directly demonstrates regular expression denial of service.

detection.llm_prompt_hint: Look for code patterns related to server-side template injection.
confidence_rules: Decrease confidence when mitigating or contradictory signals appear: trusted template names, strict allow-list.

remediation.summary: Do not evaluate user-controlled template expressions; restrict rendering to trusted templates and escaped data bindings.
cheat_sheet_refs: OWASP Server Side Template Injection Prevention guidance

evidence_requirements.preferred_snippet_focus: Show the line or small code region that most directly demonstrates server-side template injection.

issues.title: NoSQL injection through untrusted query object
issues.summary: NoSQL injection through untrusted query object
issues.description: NoSQL injection through untrusted query object

detection.llm_prompt_hint: Look for code patterns related to nosql injection through untrusted query object.
confidence_rules: Decrease confidence when mitigating or contradictory signals appear: schema validation, allow-list operators.

remediation.summary: Validate query objects strictly and avoid passing client-controlled operators directly into NoSQL filters.

evidence_requirements.preferred_snippet_focus: Show the line or small code region that most directly demonstrates nosql injection through untrusted query object.

detection.llm_prompt_hint: Look for code patterns related to ldap injection through unsanitized filter.
confidence_rules: Decrease confidence when mitigating or contradictory signals appear: ldapescape, escaped filter value.

remediation.summary: Escape LDAP filter input and use safe directory query APIs that separate data from filter syntax.
cheat_sheet_refs: OWASP LDAP Injection Prevention Cheat Sheet

evidence_requirements.preferred_snippet_focus: Show the line or small code region that most directly demonstrates ldap injection through unsanitized filter.
